'''Zehava''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]], founded a millennium before [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] rise to power. Its borders were continually being redefined during the [[Melida/Daan Civil War|civil war]] between the [[Melida/Legends|Melida]] and the [[Daan (people)/Legends|Daan]]. There are records of more than twenty-five separate battles between the Melida and the Daan, dating back more than sixty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. The [[Tenth War|Tenth Battle of Zehava]] was considered the bloodiest battle fought for control of the city. Shortly afterward, Zehava was divided into northern and southern regions, with the Daan controlling the northern-half and the Melida, the southern half. During the [[Eighteenth Battle of Zehava]], the Daan used the tunnels and drains under the city to gain secret access to Melida-held areas. Shortly before the [[Twenty-Fifth Battle of Zehava]], Daan and Melida divided the city into sectors, and even lived side-by-side for a short time.

==Appearances==
